note: This file contains example assumptions for capacity forecasting. All values are marked source=assumption and do not represent actual Arvectum production data. Replace with measured or derived values before using for procurement decisions.
notes: Calibrated from 18-case R3/XML metadata ingestion cohort. Attachments unavailable, placeholder metadata, hashing embeddings, stub LLM. This is a lower-bound estimate. Not a production capacity guarantee.

backup_compression_ratio.note: Calibrated from B2 backup. Forecast uses min(1.0, archive_to_source_ratio) for conservative estimate.

chunks_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: commercial_mvp. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

database_non_vector_bytes_per_run.note: 50 MB database storage per analysis run

commercial_mvp.description: Commercial MVP with moderate procurement volume and automated analysis

documents_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: commercial_mvp. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

embedding_rows_per_chunk.note: Two embedding vectors per chunk (original + augmented)

extracted_text_bytes_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: commercial_mvp. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

operational_margin_bytes.note: 20 GiB for Docker images, logs, updates, service files

procurements_per_month.note: Expected monthly procurement volume at commercial MVP stage

temporary_space_peak_factor.note: Calibrated from total_source_bytes / total_backup_bytes. Reflects observed temporary storage overhead.

vector_dimension.note: Example vector dimension; replace with the actual embedding model dimension measured in the Arvectum runtime

backup_compression_ratio.note: Calibrated from B2 backup. Forecast uses min(1.0, archive_to_source_ratio) for conservative estimate.

chunks_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: pilot. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

database_non_vector_bytes_per_procuremen.note: 100 MB database storage for procurement metadata, excluding vectors

database_non_vector_bytes_per_run.note: 20 MB database storage per analysis run metadata

pilot.description: Controlled pilot with limited procurements and manual analysis runs

documents_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: pilot. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

extracted_text_bytes_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: pilot. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

operational_margin_bytes.note: 10 GiB for Docker images, logs, updates, service files

other_artifact_bytes_per_run.note: 50 MB other artifacts per run (logs, intermediate files)

procurements_per_month.note: Expected monthly procurement volume during pilot

raw_document_bytes_per_procurement.note: 500 MB raw documents per procurement (PDF, DOCX, images)

report_artifact_bytes_per_run.note: 10 MB report artifacts per run (DOCX, PDF exports)

temporary_space_peak_factor.note: Calibrated from total_source_bytes / total_backup_bytes. Reflects observed temporary storage overhead.

vector_dimension.note: Example vector dimension; replace with the actual embedding model dimension measured in the Arvectum runtime

backup_compression_ratio.note: Calibrated from B2 backup. Forecast uses min(1.0, archive_to_source_ratio) for conservative estimate.

chunks_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: scaling. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

database_non_vector_bytes_per_run.note: 100 MB database storage per analysis run

scaling.description: Full-scale production with high procurement volume

documents_per_procurement.note: Calibrated from R3/XML metadata ingestion (18-case cohort). Percentile: scaling. See aggregate notes for full calibration context.

embedding_rows_per_chunk.note: Three embedding vectors per chunk (original + two augmentations)
